name: 熊刀（★） | 北方森林
descriptionEn: This tanto-style survival knife features a faceted blade and full tang, complete with impact pommel. No fuss, no moving parts - just a reliable blade that's ready to work. It has been painted using a forest camouflage hydrographic. The woods can be a dangerous place... never travel alone
descriptionZh: 这把日式短刀风格的求生刀具拥有多面刀刃和带握点的全刀柄。没有任何多余的部分 - 一把时刻准备战斗的可靠武器。 这把武器使用森林迷彩花纹进行了涂装。 森林也许会是危险之地…… 不宜一人独往
